title: McCarthy Tétrault’s Annual Mining in the Courts is now available
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault’s Annual Mining in the Courts is now available
McCarthy Tétrault’s Global Mining Litigation Group is pleased to release its 10 th anniversary edition of Mining in the Courts. This publication provides a one-stop annual update on legal developments impacting the mining industry.
Topics covered in this edition include:
- Aboriginal Law and UNDRIP
- Conflicts and Jurisdiction
- Environmental Law, including carbon pricing and Fisheries Act amendments
- Labour and Employment Law, including workplace impairment
- Shareholder Rights and Remedies
McCarthy Tétrault’s mining litigators offer strategic approaches and innovative strategies to resolve complex disputes, including through mediation, arbitration and litigation. They offer world-class experience and have expertise in the full range of issues that affect mining clients, including property ownership and construction concerns, environmental matters, Aboriginal issues and the interpretation of mining agreements. The Global Mining Litigation Group draws from one of Canada’s largest and longest-standing litigation practices, involved in some of the most high-profile, precedent-setting cases in Canadian legal history.

### Mining in the Courts Vol X
Mining in the Courts Vol X
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
